title: 2-Day Maputo Special Reserve Guided Tour
summary: Bush-and-coast short trip mixing Maputo city highlights with safari time in Maputo Special Reserve.
description: A two-day itinerary from Maputo combining city sightseeing, Mukapane and Macaneta, and a dedicated wildlife day in Maputo Special Reserve.
cancellation_policy: 80% refund for cancellations up to 2 days before the tour.

days.title: Maputo city tour, Mukapane and Macaneta
days.summary: Visit key landmarks in Maputo, then continue to Mukapane and Macaneta for nature time and beach relaxation.

days.title: Maputo Special Reserve safari
days.summary: Drive via the Maputo-Katembe bridge into the reserve for a full wildlife and landscape day before returning to Maputo.
